artifacts.title: Venous thromboembolic diseases: diagnosis, management and thrombophilia testing
assertions: Possible pulmonary embolism history includes breathlessness, chest pain and haemoptysis; unilateral leg symptoms, surgery, immobility, active cancer and previous VTE are relevant context.
The interview records inputs but does not calculate Wells or PERC scores or diagnose VTE.

artifacts.title: Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease in over 16s: diagnosis and management
assertions: Breathlessness, activity limitation, cough, sputum volume and colour, wheeze, treatment response, inhaler technique, smoking, oedema and exacerbation history support clinician review.
Pulse oximeter values require measurement context and can be inaccurate, especially around borderline values and in some skin tones.

artifacts.title: Chronic heart failure in adults: diagnosis and management
assertions: Suspected heart failure requires clinical history, examination and tests; symptom history alone does not establish the diagnosis.
Orthopnoea, nocturnal breathlessness, oedema, weight change, functional limitation, prior cardiac disease and available test results are useful handoff context.

artifacts.title: Global Strategy for Asthma Management and Prevention
assertions: Asthma-oriented history includes variable respiratory symptoms, triggers, night waking, activity limitation, reliever use and response, inhaler technique, adherence and prior severe exacerbations.
This package records patient-reported features and does not infer asthma or replace objective confirmation.

artifacts.title: Shortness of breath
assertions: Gasping, choking, inability to speak, tight or heavy chest, radiating pain, sudden colour change and sudden confusion are emergency warning features.
Children with grunting, chest recession, colour change, confusion, limpness or poor responsiveness need emergency assessment.

artifacts.title: STOM dyspnea terminology and MRCM summary
assertions: Build-time STOM verification confirmed active Dyspnea 267036007, Dyspnea at rest 161941007, Dyspnea on exertion 60845006 and Orthopnea 62744007.
MRCM returned Finding site and Severity; MRCM is terminology metadata and does not create clinical rules.
